name: Moon Shard
description: Said to be a tear from the lunar goddess Selemene.

abilities.name: Consume
abilities.description: Within a certain range, the wielder does not need to face the unit-targeted allied hero to grant them the permanent buff. Cooldown: 0. Cast Range: Global. Attack Speed Bonus: 60. Base Night Vision Bonus: 200. Ally Cast Range: 250.

abilities.name: Shade Sight
abilities.description: Grants the wielder bonus night vision. Night Vision Bonus: 400.
